sglang.title: Fix shape error that occurred when loading lora weight of gemma2 model.
sglang.author: upskyy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation & Modifications
The get_hidden_dim functions of the llama model and the gemma2 model differ, which causes a shape error when loading gemma2 lora weights.
For example, in the llama model, head_dim * num_attention_heads equals hidden_size, so using self.config.hidden_size, self.config.hidde

sglang.title: nit: Remove busy waiting on scheduler
sglang.author: rkooo567
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR includes 3 changes.

contributor guide has no instruction regarding build. I found it is in install page, and I added a link there.
Use setproctitle to change the process title for sglang. (it is contraversial, and we need to introduce a new dependency).
Scheduler has busy waiting

sglang.title: Optimize Triton decoding kernel for long context
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As mentioned in #2271, the original triton decoding kernel has significant performance degradation on long context. We refactored the kernel and adapted the flash decoding implementation from lightllm. Currently, the long context speed decay has been alleviated a lot.
Benchmark
Tested for

sglang.title: feat: support custom task runner
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Usually, when we run experiments (benchmark or evaluation), we need to do it multiple times, manually starting the server cmd and client cmd each time and collecting results. This work is very procedural and tedious, so it can be semi-automated using scripts. cc @shanyu-sys @yichuan520030

sglang.title: Simplify stream_output
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Flatten the tuple for logprobs. It makes zmq IPC faster. This is useful when using logprob + streaming.

sglang.title: [router] Improve cleanup logic
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The current sglang_router.sglang_server has overcomplicated logic of process cleanup

Replace force kill with terminate because sglang server handles graceful termination internally. It is safer and more predictable too.
Remove exception catching because it is already handled by python internal.

Th

sglang.title: [Router] fix interrupt from terminal
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The key interrupt from the terminal is not handled properly, causing uncleaned subprocesses. This issue has two main scenarios:

Without os.setpgrp():
All processes share the same Process Group ID (PGID). When you press Ctrl+C, the terminal sends SIGINT to all processes in the group simultaneously.

sglang.title: [router] defer health checking to router init
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Defer the initial health waiting to the router, so in sglang_router.launch_router, it knows to launch router only after all workers are healthy

sglang.title: reduce watchdog interval to 5s
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The current watchdog interval is 60s, which is a bit too long. Say if i want to gracefully terminate a idle sglang server by sending a TERM signal, it needs to wait around ~60s to take effect.
Modifications

This PR reduces the interval to 5s

vllm.title: [torch.compile] allow candidate compile sizes
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Usage 1:
vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B -O 3 , no compilation for specific sizes
Usage 2:
vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B -O "{'level': 3, 'candidate_compile_sizes': [1, 2, 4]}" , compile for size [1, 2, 4]
Usage 3:
vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B -O "{'level': 3, 'candidate_compi

vllm.title: [V1] Initial support of multimodal models for V1 re-arch
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds V1 support for selected image language models

 Intern-VL
 Molmo
 Pixtral
 Qwen2-VL (missing MRope implementation, will address in a separate PR) separated to #12128

vllm.title: [misc] clean up and unify logging
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: using f-string to make it easy to insert fields in the middle. previously the logger.info in vllm/engine/llm_engine.py is almost impossible to insert, if you don't want to pair the %s with the following args.

vllm.title: [Doc][V1] Add V1 support column for multimodal models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since the V1 support for multimodal models will roll out gradually unlike text models, this PR adds a column in the documentation to indicate what's available in V1.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] add dynamo time tracking
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
$ vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B
Graph capturing finished in 10 secs, took 0.32 GiB
init engine (profile, create kv cache, warmup model) took 14.18 seconds

$ vllm serve meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B -O3
Dynamo bytecode transform time: 4.60 s
Compiling a graph for general shape takes 14.77 s
